package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for repository_mixes_raw_sql_and_gorm_same_method_without_adapter_boundary: Repository methods that mix raw SQL and ORM clauses with no clear boundary.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule130NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule130NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule130NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario130Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule130NegativeService, input Rule130NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
